decks.notes: This deck focuses on playing aggressive creatures and spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent. By combining low-cost creatures like Slickshot Show-Off and Eddymurk Crab with efficient spells like Burst Lightning and Opt, the deck aims to deal damage early and often. The inclusion of cards like Boomerang Basics and Sleight of Hand allows for card advantage and manipulation, while Stormchaser's Talent and Colorstorm Stallion provide additional options for dealing damage. The mana base is designed to ensure consistent access to both red and blue mana sources for the deck's spells.

The main concept of this deck revolves around utilizing a combination of cards that focus on bringing powerful creatures back from the graveyard (Reanimator) and using them in tandem with other cards to create a powerful combo. By strategically utilizing cards like Deceit and Superior Spider-Man alongside support cards like Duress and Stock Up, the goal is to overwhelm your opponent with strong creatures while disrupting their game plan with spells like Bitter Triumph and Strategic Betrayal. The deck also includes various lands to ensure consistent mana production for casting these powerful spells.

This deck focuses on utilizing low-cost creatures with evasion and card advantage to quickly overwhelm the opponent. By combining cards that provide aggression and disruption, the strategy is to maintain board presence while controlling the opponent's options. The deck aims to apply pressure early on and maintain tempo throughout the game by making efficient trades and utilizing powerful spells to clear the way for attacks. It also utilizes lands that provide flexibility and consistency in mana production to ensure it can constantly apply pressure on the opponent.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by using a combination of spells and abilities to disrupt the opponent's strategy. By utilizing cards like Abandon Attachments and Combustion Technique, the deck aims to remove threats from the board while maintaining card advantage through Accumulate Wisdom and Artist's Talent. Additionally, the deck can generate value through Monument to Endurance and Stormchaser's Talent, setting up for a powerful finish with cards like Firebending Lesson and It'll Quench Ya!. The mana base is designed to support the various color requirements of the spells in the deck.

This deck focuses on controlling the game through a combination of counterspells, removal, and card advantage. By using cards like Tablet of Discovery and Stock Up to draw cards, along with Inevitable Defeat and Jeskai Revelation to control the board, the deck aims to outlast the opponent and win through attrition. The deck also includes a variety of versatile spells like Thunder Magic and Abrade to handle different threats. Overall, this deck aims to maintain control of the game while steadily building towards a victory.

The focus of this deck is to utilize aggressive creatures and efficient spells to pressure the opponent and finish the game quickly. The deck aims to establish early board presence with creatures like Eddymurk Crab and Slickshot Show-Off, while using cheap spells like Burst Lightning and Opt to control the board and clear a path for the creatures to attack. The deck also includes bounce spells like Boomerang Basics and Prismari Charm to disrupt the opponent's strategy and maintain tempo. By applying constant pressure and protecting its threats, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and secure a victory.

This Mono Green Aggro deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with cards like Llanowar Elves and Earthbender Ascension to play powerful creatures like Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo. The deck also utilizes cards like Mightform Harmonizer and Esper Origins to buff up creatures and apply pressure on the opponent. With the ability to quickly build a board presence and maintain pressure, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents with its efficient and aggressive gameplay.

The deck focuses on utilizing creatures in the graveyard to quickly bring them back onto the battlefield for powerful combos and reanimation tactics. It includes cards that manipulate opponent's hands, control the board, and provide protection for the key pieces of the strategy. The land base is structured to ensure consistent mana sources for the deck's ability to reanimate creatures and execute its combo plays effectively. The main goal is to outmaneuver opponents by overwhelming them with unexpected plays and controlling the game tempo with well-timed reanimation spells and combos.

The deck focuses on efficiently dealing damage as quickly as possible using small aggressive creatures and burn spells. By combining creature and direct damage spells, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent before they can stabilize or mount a defense. With a mix of efficient creatures like Emberheart Challenger and Hexing Squelcher, alongside powerful burn spells like Burst Lightning and Lightning Helix, the deck can quickly close out games before the opponent has a chance to respond. The mana base is optimized for consistent casting of both creatures and burn spells.

The main purpose of this deck is to control the board through a mix of card draw, counterspells, and removal spells. By utilizing a combination of card advantage and efficient removal, the deck aims to outvalue the opponent and dictate the pace of the game. The inclusion of Gran-Gran and The Dawning Archaic provide additional card advantage and flexibility, while cards like Firebending Lesson and Combustion Technique offer efficient removal options. Additionally, the deck includes powerful finishers like Jeskai Revelation to close out the game once the opponent has been sufficiently controlled.

The main focus of this Izzet Control deck is to gain card advantage through drawing, filtering, and discarding cards. By efficiently managing resources and controlling the board with removal spells, counterspells, and other interactions, the deck aims to outvalue and outlast the opponent. The inclusion of powerful spells like Jeskai Revelation and Combustion Technique further enhances the deck's ability to control the game while setting up for a win condition. This deck thrives on its ability to adapt to different situations and maintain control over the game until it can secure a victory.

This deck focuses on quickly establishing a board presence and overwhelming the opponent with a combination of evasive creatures and burn spells. By efficiently casting low-cost spells and utilizing cards like Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off, the deck aims to deal damage quickly and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The inclusion of card draw and versatile spells like Burst Lightning and Opt allows for consistent aggression and adaptability in different matchups. The mana base is carefully constructed to ensure smooth mana curve and access to all necessary colors for optimal performance.

This Izzet Control deck focuses on utilizing a combination of removal spells, counterspells, and card draw to control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy. The deck aims to stall the game and outvalue the opponent with efficient creatures like Eddymurk Crab and Hearth Elemental, while also utilizing powerful spells like Burst Lightning and Traumatic Critique to maintain control. The deck also includes some utility lands like Riverpyre Verge and Multiversal Passage to help fix mana and ensure consistency in casting spells.

This deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and efficient removal spells to control the tempo of the game. By using a combination of low-cost creatures and buffs, it can quickly deal damage to the opponent while maintaining board presence. The inclusion of a few key creatures with powerful abilities enhances the deck's versatility and allows for strategic plays. The mana base is carefully constructed to ensure consistent access to the deck's colors and maximize efficiency. This deck is built for speed and aggression, pressuring opponents to act quickly and decisively.

This deck focuses on quickly building a board presence with efficient creatures like Badgermole Cub and Gene Pollinator, supported by ramp from Llanowar Elves. Key cards like Ouroboroid and Pawpatch Recruit help to maintain pressure on the opponent while Keen-Eyed Curator and Scavenging Ooze provide utility and disruption. The top end of the deck includes powerful finishers like Tyvar, the Pummeler and Surrak, Elusive Hunter. Overprotect and Archdruid's Charm provide protection and additional combat tricks. Vivien Reid offers card advantage and removal support, while Agonasaur Rex provides a big threat. The mana base is streamlined with Forests and Ba Sing Se.

This deck focuses on quickly developing a board presence with efficient creatures like Badgermole Cub and Ouroboroid, supported by ramp from Llanowar Elves. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures while utilizing cards like Erode and Seam Rip for removal. The inclusion of Keen-Eyed Curator and Sage of the Skies provides card advantage and flying threats, while cards like Surrak, Elusive Hunter and Practiced Offense help push through damage. The mana base is optimized for consistent plays and the deck can adapt to different board states with cards like Meltstrider's Resolve and Shardmage's Rescue.
